title: OutcomeDeclaration
description: An outcome declaration — what should be true after an agent runs. See specification/sections/01-outcome-declaration.md.

as_of.description: Date the outcome was declared (Requirement 1.1.2). ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 calendar date.

question.description: The question the agent will answer (Requirement 1.1.3).

success_criteria.description: One or more free-form English clauses the verifier checks the report against (Requirement 1.1.4).

archetype.description: Optional discriminator for the kind of outcome (Requirement 1.2.1). Reference vocabulary: 'vendor_comparison', 'deep_dive', 'capability_audit'. Implementations may add others.

archetype_fields.description: Archetype-specific fields (Requirement 1.2.2). Verifiers that do not understand the archetype MUST fall back to checking only archetype-independent requirements.

requester.description: Optional free-form label for who requested this outcome.
